backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining a clothing store backend with Product, CartItem, and Order types, plus stable maps for products, carts, and orders, and an initializeStore function that seeds 12 sample products across four categories.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that Header.tsx and Footer.tsx were updated to use the new 'dhimayu-logo-black.dim_400x400.png' logo without any background wrapper, mapped to test requirement REQ-25.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON dictionary of short summaries for every frontend source file, describing the purpose and key design details of each component, page, hook, and config file in the project.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining OKLCH CSS color tokens for light and dark modes using a neutral (zero chroma) palette, with destructive and chart colors as the only chromatic exceptions.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point that sets the page title to 'DHIMAYU STUDIO' and mounts the React app via /src/main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Configures TanStack Router with seven routes (home, catalog, product, cart, checkout, order-confirmation, admin) all nested under a Layout root route.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Three-column footer displaying the black logo image with an error fallback text, collections and studio link lists, copyright line, and a caffeine.ai attribution badge.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky header with a centered logo image, desktop category nav buttons, an Admin link, a cart icon with item count badge, and a collapsible mobile nav drawer.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Shell layout component that wraps every page with Header at the top, Footer at the bottom, and a TanStack Router Outlet for page content in between.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Renders a product card with a hover-reveal quick-add-to-cart button, product image placeholder, name, sizes, and price, linking to the product detail page.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context with login/logout functionality, identity persistence via AuthClient, and status tracking, exposed through a React context and hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines all React Query hooks for the app, including queries and mutations for products, cart, orders, and store initialization, using the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts (Cormorant Garamond, Jost), configures Tailwind, and defines a warm neutral CSS custom property palette for light and dark modes.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility module exporting class merging (cn), price formatting, and category label/slug/image mapping constants for the four product categories.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/Admin.tsx: Admin page for managing products, providing a table view with add, edit, and delete actions via dialogs, backed by the product mutation hooks.
frontend/src/pages/Cart.tsx: Renders the shopping cart page with a list of cart items, quantity controls (increment/decrement/remove), and an order summary with subtotal and checkout navigation.
frontend/src/pages/Catalog.tsx: Displays a product catalog page filtered by category, with category tab navigation, loading skeletons, error/empty states, and a responsive product grid.
frontend/src/pages/Checkout.tsx: Provides a checkout form collecting customer name and delivery address, displays an order summary with line items and subtotal, and submits the order via mutation before navigating to confirmation.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Renders the homepage with a hero banner, brand statement section, and a category card grid; auto-initializes the store if no products exist.
frontend/src/pages/OrderConfirmation.tsx: Shows a post-order confirmation screen with a success icon, order reference ID from URL search params, and links to return home or continue shopping.
frontend/src/pages/ProductDetail.tsx: Displays a single product's details including name, price, stock status, size selector, and an add-to-cart button with loading and success feedback states.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the Dhimayu Studio frontend, extending the default theme with custom fonts (Cormorant Garamond, Jost), OKLCH-based color tokens, border radii, box shadows, and keyframe animations, while enabling dark mode and the typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the overall project state (version 25) for Dhimayu Studio, recording the app summary, architectural notes, image requirements, and a list of existing implemented features such as homepage, product catalog, product detail, shopping cart, and checkout pages.
